sql_array: CREATE TABLE train_data (id UInt32, feature1 Float32, feature2 Float32, label Int8);
CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, feature1 Float32, feature2 Float32);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 0.3, NULL), (2, 0.6, 0.4), (3, 0.0, 1.0), (4, NULL, 0.5);
WITH (SELECT state FROM train_data) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data WHERE feature1 NOT IN (SELECT feature1 FROM train_data WHERE label < 0);

SELECT id, probability < 0.5 AND probability IS NOT NULL FROM (WITH (SELECT state FROM train_data) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data) AS probabilities WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM train_data WHERE label = 1);
WITH (SELECT state FROM train_data) AS model SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT evalMLMethod(model, feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM test_data) HAVING total > 0;
SELECT id, feature1, feature2, CASE WHEN evalMLMethod((SELECT state FROM train_data), feature1, feature2) NOT IN (0.0, 1.0) THEN 'Unknown' ELSE 'Known' END AS classification FROM test_data;
SELECT feature1, AVG(feature2) AS avg_feature2 FROM train_data GROUP BY feature1 HAVING feature1 NOT IN (SELECT feature1 FROM train_data WHERE label = 1) AND avg_feature2 < 0.5;
